requirement_topic.en: EMC Generic Immunity & Emissions — UKCA Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容通用抗扰度与发射——UKCA合规框架
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容通用抗擾度與發射——UKCA合規框架

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters placed on the GB market must comply with the Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091, as retained and amended in UK law). The mandatory legal obligation is compliance with the essential EMC protection requirements and the applicable conformity-marking/documentation duties. UKCA and CE are currently both accepted in Great Britain. UK designated standards such as BS EN IEC 61000-6-2 (generic immunity, industrial environment) and BS EN IEC 61000-6-4 (generic emissions, industrial environment) provide a voluntary presumption-of-conformity route; they are not the mandatory legal obligation and alternative evidence may be used.
summary.zh: 投放大不列颠市场的并网光伏逆变器须符合《2016年电磁兼容法规》（SI 2016/1091，经英国法律保留并修订）。强制性法律义务是满足基本EMC防护要求以及适用的合格标志/文件义务。UKCA和CE目前在大不列颠均被接受。英国指定标准（如BS EN IEC 61000-6-2通用抗扰度、工业环境，以及BS EN IEC 61000-6-4通用骚扰发射、工业环境）提供自愿的符合性推定路径；其本身不是强制性法律义务，也可采用其他证据。
summary.zht: 投放大不列顛市場的並網光伏逆變器須符合《2016年電磁相容法規》（SI 2016/1091，經英國法律保留並修訂）。強制性法律義務是符合基本EMC防護要求以及適用的合格標誌／文件義務。UKCA和CE目前在大不列顛均被接受。英國指定標準（如BS EN IEC 61000-6-2通用抗擾度、工業環境，以及BS EN IEC 61000-6-4通用騷擾發射、工業環境）提供自願的符合性推定路徑；其本身不是強制性法律義務，也可採用其他證據。

standards_or_laws: BS EN IEC 61000-6-2:2019 (UK designated standard — generic immunity, industrial)
BS EN IEC 61000-6-4:2019 (UK designated standard — generic emissions, industrial)

summary.en: In China, grid-tied PV inverters typically demonstrate EMC compliance through GB/T 17799.2 (generic immunity, industrial environment) and GB/T 17799.4 (generic emissions, industrial environment), both of which are national recommended standards (推荐性标准, T-standard). These are derived from IEC 61000-6-2 and IEC 61000-6-4 respectively but may lag behind the current IEC edition. EMC is often addressed as part of the NB/T 32004 inverter product standard assessment.
summary.zh: 在中国，并网光伏逆变器的电磁兼容符合性通常通过GB/T 17799.2（通用抗扰度，工业环境）和GB/T 17799.4（通用骚扰发射，工业环境）来证明，两者均为推荐性国家标准。上述标准分别源自IEC 61000-6-2和IEC 61000-6-4，但版本可能滞后于现行IEC版本。EMC测试通常作为NB/T 32004逆变器产品标准认证的一部分进行。
summary.zht: 在中國，並網光伏逆變器的電磁相容符合性通常通過GB/T 17799.2（通用抗擾度，工業環境）及GB/T 17799.4（通用騷擾發射，工業環境）來證明，兩者均為推薦性國家標準。上述標準分別源自IEC 61000-6-2及IEC 61000-6-4，但版本可能滯後於現行IEC版本。EMC測試通常作為NB/T 32004逆變器產品標準認證的一部分進行。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004 (PV inverter product standard, includes EMC scope)

gap.en: The core technical limits in BS EN IEC 61000-6-2/-6-4 and GB/T 17799.2/.4 are both derived from IEC 61000-6-2/-6-4, so the test content is largely aligned. The compliance gap is procedural and jurisdictional: (1) the GB route must support a valid CE or UKCA conformity claim and technical file; UKCA documentation cites UK legislation and any UK designated standards relied upon, while CE documentation relies on the corresponding EU route accepted in GB under SI 2024/696; (2) Chinese CQC/NB/T test reports are not automatically transferable and should be mapped or retested against the UK/EU evidence route used; (3) edition alignment risk remains if the UK designated or EU harmonised standard references a newer IEC edition than the Chinese GB/T version.
gap.zh: BS EN IEC 61000-6-2/-6-4与GB/T 17799.2/.4的核心技术限值均源自IEC 61000-6-2/-6-4，测试内容大体一致。合规差距主要体现在程序与管辖层面：（1）大不列颠路径须支撑有效CE或UKCA合规声明和技术文件；UKCA文件引用英国法规及所依赖的英国指定标准，CE文件则依赖SI 2024/696在大不列颠接受的相应欧盟路径；（2）中国CQC/NB/T检测报告不会自动转用，应根据所采用的英国/欧盟证据路径进行映射或重新测试；（3）若英国指定或欧盟协调标准对应更新版IEC版本，而中国GB/T版本较旧，则仍存在版本对齐风险。
gap.zht: BS EN IEC 61000-6-2/-6-4與GB/T 17799.2/.4的核心技術限值均源自IEC 61000-6-2/-6-4，測試內容大體一致。合規差距主要體現在程序與管轄層面：（1）大不列顛路徑須支撐有效CE或UKCA合規聲明和技術文件；UKCA文件引用英國法規及所依賴的英國指定標準，CE文件則依賴SI 2024/696在大不列顛接受的相應歐盟路徑；（2）中國CQC/NB/T檢測報告不會自動轉用，應根據所採用的英國／歐盟證據路徑進行映射或重新測試；（3）若英國指定或歐盟協調標準對應更新版IEC版本，而中國GB/T版本較舊，則仍存在版本對齊風險。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — essential EMC protection requirements under Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091); BS EN IEC 61000-6-2/-6-4 are voluntary UK designated standards giving presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: Recommended (GB/T) — but EMC compliance is a de facto prerequisite for grid-connection certification under NB/T 32004

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese test data to GB/T 17799.2/.4 provides a useful technical baseline. For GB placement, the mandatory duty is conformity with SI 2016/1091, supported by adequate technical documentation and a valid CE or UKCA route. UK designated standards and UKAS-accredited reports are common evidence routes, but the standards are voluntary and self-declaration is permitted under the EMC Regulations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据GB/T 17799.2/.4取得的中国检测数据可提供有用的技术基准。投放大不列颠市场的强制性义务是符合SI 2016/1091，并以充分技术文件和有效CE或UKCA路径作为支撑。英国指定标准和UKAS认可报告是常见证据路径，但标准本身为自愿采用，且EMC法规允许自我声明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據GB/T 17799.2/.4取得的中國檢測數據可提供有用的技術基準。投放大不列顛市場的強制性義務是符合SI 2016/1091，並以充分技術文件和有效CE或UKCA路徑作為支撐。英國指定標準和UKAS認可報告是常見證據路徑，但標準本身為自願採用，且EMC法規允許自我聲明。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Harmonic Current Emissions — UKCA Framework
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容谐波电流发射——UKCA合规框架
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容諧波電流發射——UKCA合規框架

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters connected to the public low-voltage supply must meet the essential EMC protection requirements under the Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016. Harmonic current emission evidence is commonly demonstrated through voluntary UK designated standards: BS EN IEC 61000-3-2 (equipment input current <=16 A per phase) or BS EN IEC 61000-3-12 (equipment input current >16 A and <=75 A per phase), depending on the inverter's rated input current. Correct use of these standards can give presumption of conformity; the standards themselves are not mandatory legal obligations. They are listed as UK designated standards under the EMC Regulations 2016 via notices of publication on gov.uk. Note: confirm the currently designated version on the gov.uk EMC designated standards page before compiling a technical file.
summary.zh: 连接至公用低压供电系统的并网光伏逆变器须符合《2016年电磁兼容法规》的基本EMC防护要求。谐波电流发射证据通常通过自愿采用的英国指定标准证明：BS EN IEC 61000-3-2（设备输入电流每相≤16 A）或BS EN IEC 61000-3-12（设备输入电流每相>16 A且≤75 A），具体取决于逆变器额定输入电流。正确适用这些标准可赋予符合性推定；其本身不是强制性法律义务。上述标准已通过gov.uk上的发布通知列为EMC条例2016项下的英国指定标准（最新综合通知：ds-0071-22及后续更新）。注：IEC 61000-3-2第5.2版已于2024年发布——在编制技术文件前，请在gov.uk EMC指定标准页面确认当前指定版本。
summary.zht: 連接至公用低壓供電系統的並網光伏逆變器須符合《2016年電磁相容法規》的基本EMC防護要求。諧波電流發射證據通常通過自願採用的英國指定標準證明：BS EN IEC 61000-3-2（設備輸入電流每相≤16 A）或BS EN IEC 61000-3-12（設備輸入電流每相>16 A且≤75 A），具體取決於逆變器額定輸入電流。正確適用這些標準可賦予符合性推定；其本身不是強制性法律義務。上述標準已通過gov.uk上的發布通知列為EMC條例2016項下的英國指定標準（最新綜合通知：ds-0071-22及後續更新）。注：IEC 61000-3-2第5.2版已於2024年發布——在編製技術文件前，請在gov.uk EMC指定標準頁面確認當前指定版本。

standards_or_laws: BS EN IEC 61000-3-2:2019+A1:2021 (UK designated standard — harmonic current emissions, ≤16 A/phase; confirm current listed version at gov.uk/government/publications/designated-standards-emc as IEC 61000-3-2 Ed 5.2 was published 2024)
BS EN IEC 61000-3-12:2011 (UK designated standard — harmonic current emissions, >16 A and ≤75 A/phase; confirm current listed version at gov.uk EMC designated standards page)

summary.en: In China, harmonic current emission limits for grid-connected equipment are addressed through GB 17625.1 (harmonic current emissions, equipment input current ≤16 A per phase, a mandatory standard equivalent to IEC 61000-3-2) and GB/T 17625.8 (harmonic current emissions, >16 A and ≤75 A per phase, a recommended standard equivalent to IEC 61000-3-12). GB 17625.1 is a compulsory national standard (强制性标准). For PV inverters, harmonic performance at the grid connection point is also governed by grid-code requirements under GB/T 19939 and the NB/T 32004 inverter standard.
summary.zh: 在中国，并网设备的谐波电流发射限值通过GB 17625.1（谐波电流发射，设备输入电流每相≤16 A，强制性标准，等效IEC 61000-3-2）和GB/T 17625.8（谐波电流发射，每相>16 A且≤75 A，推荐性标准，等效IEC 61000-3-12）加以规范。GB 17625.1为强制性国家标准。对于光伏逆变器，并网点谐波性能还受GB/T 19939及NB/T 32004逆变器标准的电网规范要求约束。
summary.zht: 在中國，並網設備的諧波電流發射限值通過GB 17625.1（諧波電流發射，設備輸入電流每相≤16 A，強制性標準，等效IEC 61000-3-2）及GB/T 17625.8（諧波電流發射，每相>16 A且≤75 A，推薦性標準，等效IEC 61000-3-12）加以規範。GB 17625.1為強制性國家標準。對於光伏逆變器，並網點諧波性能還受GB/T 19939及NB/T 32004逆變器標準的電網規範要求約束。

standards_or_laws: GB 17625.1 (mandatory — harmonic current emissions, ≤16 A/phase, equiv. IEC 61000-3-2)
GB/T 17625.8 (recommended — harmonic current emissions, >16 A and ≤75 A/phase, equiv. IEC 61000-3-12)

gap.en: The technical harmonic limits in BS EN IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12 and GB 17625.1/GB/T 17625.8 are both derived from IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12, so limit values are largely aligned. Key gaps: (1) conformity route: Chinese CQC test reports under GB 17625.1 are not automatically accepted for a GB CE or UKCA route and should be mapped or retested against the applicable evidence route; (2) edition currency: GB 17625.1 may reference an older IEC 61000-3-2 edition, so verify that test conditions match the current standard relied upon; (3) for inverters >16 A/phase, the Rsce boundary conditions in GB/T 17625.8 vs BS EN IEC 61000-3-12 should be verified for the specific grid connection point; (4) self-declaration is permissible under SI 2016/1091 for EMC, and no mandatory third-party certification body is required, but the technical file must be retained for 10 years.
gap.zh: BS EN IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12与GB 17625.1/GB/T 17625.8的谐波技术限值均源自IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12，限值大体一致。主要差距：（1）符合性路径：中国CQC依据GB 17625.1出具的检测报告不会自动被大不列颠CE或UKCA路径接受，应根据适用证据路径进行映射或重新测试；（2）版本现行性：GB 17625.1可能引用较旧版IEC 61000-3-2，需核实测试条件是否与所依赖的当前标准一致；（3）对于每相>16 A的逆变器，须针对具体并网点核实GB/T 17625.8与BS EN IEC 61000-3-12中Rsce边界条件的差异；（4）SI 2016/1091允许EMC采用自我声明方式，无需强制第三方认证机构，但技术文件须保存10年。
gap.zht: BS EN IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12與GB 17625.1/GB/T 17625.8的諧波技術限值均源自IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12，限值大體一致。主要差距：（1）符合性路徑：中國CQC依據GB 17625.1出具的檢測報告不會自動被大不列顛CE或UKCA路徑接受，應根據適用證據路徑進行映射或重新測試；（2）版本現行性：GB 17625.1可能引用較舊版IEC 61000-3-2，需核實測試條件是否與所依賴的當前標準一致；（3）對於每相>16 A的逆變器，須針對具體並網點核實GB/T 17625.8與BS EN IEC 61000-3-12中Rsce邊界條件的差異；（4）SI 2016/1091允許EMC採用自我聲明方式，無需強制第三方認證機構，但技術文件須保存10年。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — essential EMC protection requirements under Electromagnetic Compatibility Regulations 2016 (SI 2016/1091); BS EN IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12 are voluntary UK designated standards giving presumption of conformity
mandatory_status.cn: GB 17625.1 is mandatory (强制性); GB/T 17625.8 is recommended (推荐性)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 17625.1 / GB/T 17625.8 test data is a relevant technical starting point, but it does not by itself satisfy GB market duties. The mandatory obligation is conformity with SI 2016/1091, supported by adequate technical documentation and a valid CE or UKCA route. BS EN IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12 are voluntary designated-standard routes to presumption of conformity; self-declaration is permitted and a UK Approved Body is not mandated for EMC.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] GB 17625.1/GB/T 17625.8检测数据可作为有价值的技术起点，但其本身不能满足大不列颠市场义务。强制性义务是符合SI 2016/1091，并以充分技术文件和有效CE或UKCA路径作为支撑。BS EN IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12是取得符合性推定的自愿指定标准路径；EMC允许自我声明，不强制要求英国认可机构。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] GB 17625.1/GB/T 17625.8檢測數據可作為有價值的技術起點，但其本身不能滿足大不列顛市場義務。強制性義務是符合SI 2016/1091，並以充分技術文件和有效CE或UKCA路徑作為支撐。BS EN IEC 61000-3-2/-3-12是取得符合性推定的自願指定標準路徑；EMC允許自我聲明，不強制要求英國認可機構。
